title: Cricket History
answer: Cricket developed in England and by the 18th century had become the country's national summer sport. It later spread through the British Empire and grew into a major international game played across Asia, Oceania, Africa, Europe, and the Caribbean.

title: India vs Pakistan Rivalry
answer: India vs Pakistan is widely regarded as cricket's biggest rivalry because of the sporting stakes, history, fan intensity, and repeated high-pressure ICC encounters. The rivalry carries far more emotional weight than a normal bilateral series.
examples: Tell me about India vs Pakistan rivalry

title: Legendary Players
answer: A short list of all-time cricket legends usually includes Don Bradman, Sachin Tendulkar, Viv Richards, Jacques Kallis, Shane Warne, Muttiah Muralitharan, Wasim Akram, and MS Dhoni. The exact order depends on the format and the criteria being used.
examples: Who are the legendary cricket players?

title: 2019 World Cup Final
answer: One of cricket's most famous matches is the 2019 Men's World Cup final between England and New Zealand at Lord's. The match ended tied, the Super Over ended tied, and England were awarded the title on the boundary-count rule that was in place at the time.
examples: Tell me a famous cricket match
